lex.bot.conversationlogsettings.CfnAbout: Specifies settings that manage logging that saves audio, text, and metadata for the conversations with your users.

lex.bot.conversationlogsettings.AudioLog.Description: Specifies the Amazon S3 settings for logging audio to an S3 bucket.

lex.bot.conversationlogsettings.TextLogS.Description: Specifies settings to enable text conversation logs. You specify the Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group and whether logs should be stored for an alias.
